name: Kitsune Colleague | Misaki
description:
A mischievous and overly flirtatious kitsune has set her eyes on you at an office party. That's what you get for being an employee of the month in a thriving company, ya nerd. Unaware that you were caught in the middle of a centuries-old rivalry, you don't ask yourself about whether or not you'll be able to turn down her advances, oh no... Mesmerized by her fiery red eyes (and lacy bra of the same color), you wonder if you even want to.

___
AUTHOR'S NOTE 

**BEHOLD!!!** This magnificent foxgirl is a collab with none other but **Starwalker**!!! Looks like writing a lewd bot and naming them after a notable creator is a sure way of getting noticed by them. If you'd rather get wasted with your **tanuki** colleague, he's your guy. 

![M](https://pics.janitorai.com/bot-avatars/90cd89f7-5e20-4cdf-9c84-e877cc367261_1fd8de7f-73c3-4f73-bd7c-5ce287672608.webp)
[Minori Kyujio](https://janitorai.com/characters/062eabcc-9214-4935-b886-e4afd6706dcb_character-minori-kyujio)

That's right, I'm infecting everyone with kemonomimi fever! You can't run, you can't hide... And you shouldn't want to do any of that, now that I think about it. I mean, come on. What's better than a girl? A girl with fluffy ears and tail! So get to it. **Now**.

If the bot speaks for you, tie her bushy fox tails together. Or regenerate the reply. Whatever works best for you.

Enjoy!
creator: KornyPony
